title: Deciphering the Anti-Tumor Mechanisms of Metformin Through Reprogramming of the Tumor Microenvironment.
snippet: Metformin is a cornerstone medication for type 2 diabetes and exhibits anti-tumor activities. Previous studies have demonstrated that metformin suppresses tumor progression by regulating multiple signaling pathways, including the AMPK, PI3K/AKT/mTOR, and JNK pathways. However, most previous studies have focused on its direct effects on tumor cells, with lim...
